evals.name: web-verification-localhost
evals.prompt: localhost:3000 열어서 메인 페이지가 로드되는지 확인하고 스크린샷 찍어줘
evals.expected_output: Web platform detected, Playwright dependency checked, connection to localhost:3000 attempted, edge case handled if server not running
expectations: Agent detects web platform from 'localhost:3000' signal
Agent checks node --version and npx playwright --version as first action
Agent writes a Playwright script to navigate to localhost:3000
If connection refused: agent reports 'Connection refused at localhost:3000. Start the dev server and try again' and stops without starting a server
If connection succeeds: agent captures screenshot and reports path
Final output follows the Simulator Verification Report template

evals.name: mobile-simctl-safari-screenshot
evals.prompt: iOS 시뮬레이터 부팅하고 Safari에서 example.com 열어서 스크린샷 찍어줘
evals.expected_output: Mobile platform detected, simctl and maestro checked, simulator booted, URL opened, screenshot captured
expectations: Agent detects mobile platform from '시뮬레이터' and 'iOS' signals
Agent checks xcrun simctl help and maestro --version as first action
Agent lists available devices and selects by UDID (not by name)
Agent boots simulator and reports device name, iOS version, UDID
Agent opens example.com via xcrun simctl openurl booted
Agent captures screenshot after URL open
Final output follows the Simulator Verification Report template with Screenshots section

evals.name: ambiguous-platform-disambiguation
evals.expected_output: Agent asks clarifying question about platform before proceeding
expectations: Agent does NOT assume web or mobile
Agent asks the user: '웹 앱 검증인가요, iOS 앱 검증인가요?' (or equivalent disambiguation question)
Agent does NOT run any dependency checks or commands before getting platform clarification
Agent does NOT proceed with any verification workflow steps
